problem id: 585f2ff6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00011001 -> 10010011
  10100100 -> 01010100
  01110110 -> 01101110
  01110001 -> 00011110
  10101011 -> 10100101
  01010000 -> 00001010
  11011000 -> 10011011
  01111011 -> 10111111

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 01000100
